query: SELECT id, title, slug, description, sortOrder FROM essays ORDER BY sortOrder LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Y9wzvyJgsWeM7p.fc93ab011512 --database ZLCef8c8rdYgPCof2teogL --execute SELECT id, title, slug, description, sortOrder FROM essays ORDER BY sortOrder LIMIT 5;

rows.title: The Long Breathing
rows.description: A meditation on Peter Yuill's practice, 2018-2025. The primary curatorial essay exploring the seven-year arc as a single, unbroken descent and ascent.

rows.title: The Practice of Honest Abstraction
rows.description: On the career of Peter Yuill (2018–2025). An examination of spiritual authenticity within contemporary abstraction.

rows.title: The Long Descent
rows.description: A comprehensive curatorial reading of Peter Yuill's practice (2018–2025). The most detailed analysis of the seven-year arc.
